channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ongoing Developments in the Middle East Conflict as of March 25, 2026
item.description: The Middle East continues to face heightened tensions as of March 25, 2026, with significant geopolitical implications. Recent events have drawn international attention due to escalations involving th...

item.title: Abuja Court Finally Returns Sowore’s Passport After Cybercrime Case Dismissal
item.description: Human rights activist and former presidential candidate Omoyele Sowore don finally get him international passport back after more than one year wey e dey with court because of one cybercrime case wey ...

item.title: USMCA compliance offers limited relief as Canadian small businesses face U.S. tariffs
item.description: Many Canadian small businesses are struggling despite complying with the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA). Products that meet USMCA requirements should, in theory, be exempt from most U.S...

item.title: Ed Miliband explores reforms to decouple gas and electricity pricing in bid to cut household bills
item.description: Energy Secretary Ed Miliband has told Labour MPs that he is examining ways to separate electricity prices from gas costs to help lower household energy bills. Speaking to the Parliamentary Labour Part...

item.title: Tanzania explores using Air Tanzania cargo flights to sustain meat exports affected by Middle East conflict
item.description: Tanzania is taking steps to safeguard its growing meat export industry after flight disruptions caused by tensions in the Middle East led to a sharp fall in export volumes. The Tanzania Meat Board rev...

item.title: Supreme Court Justice Singh Shares Personal Journey Battling Cancer and Continuing Service
item.description: Supreme Court Associate Justice Maria Filomena Singh openly shared her personal experience battling cancer during the 1st Supreme Court Distinguished Women’s Forum on March 24, 2026. Appointed to the ...

item.title: Tim Gurner expands Saint Haven wellness clubs with medical and longevity services
item.description: Billionaire property developer Tim Gurner is intensifying his investment in the booming wellness and longevity sector through his Saint Haven brand in Melbourne. The South Yarra club has undergone a $...

item.title: Super Eagles begin friendly tournament camp in Turkey with 13 players present
item.description: The Super Eagles of Nigeria don open their training camp for Turkey ahead of a four-nation friendly tournament. Thirteen players don already land for Antalya, with some new faces joining the regular b...

item.title: NASA Confirms Lunar Base Plans and Cancels Gateway Station
item.description: NASA has officially outlined its updated lunar exploration plans, revealing the construction of a lunar base and the cancellation of the Lunar Gateway station. Initially planned as a non-crewed instal...

item.title: Western Cape Premier Addresses Fuel Hoarding Concerns Amid Price Hikes
item.description: Premier Alan Winde has highlighted concerns over fuel hoarding by suppliers in the Western Cape, which could exacerbate localised shortages despite South Africa's overall fuel supply being stable. Whi...

item.title: Maharashtra Bhavan Expansion Ceremony Takes Place in Mauritius
item.description: A significant milestone was achieved with the groundbreaking ceremony for the expansion of Maharashtra Bhavan, which took place in Mauritius. The event marks an important step towards enhancing cultur...

item.title: South Africa positions itself as a stable investment hub despite global uncertainty
item.description: As South Africa readies to host the sixth South African Investment Conference (SAIC), government leaders, economists and investors view the event as a significant chance to attract investment and show...

item.title: Parliament directs Nkabane to apologise for irregularities in Seta board appointments
item.description: Parliament’s joint committee on ethics and members’ interests has directed former higher education minister Nobuhle Nkabane to issue a formal apology in the National Assembly after she was found to ha...

item.title: RCMP investigates Calgary councillors in corruption case; no charges laid so far
item.description: The RCMP has launched a corruption investigation involving Calgary City Hall, executing several search warrants last week targeting one current and one former city councillor, as well as a local busin...

item.title: Waterloo raises development fees for new residential construction
item.description: The City of Waterloo has announced an increase in development charges that will affect new housing projects. These charges, which developers typically pay to help fund infrastructure like roads, sewer...

item.title: 32 Bodies Including 25 Children Exhumed from Suspected Secret Mass Grave in Kericho Cemetery
item.description: On Tuesday 24th March 2026, authorities in Kericho exhumed 32 bodies from a mass grave at Makaburini Cemetery. The bodies comprised seven adults and 25 children, some decomposed while neonates appeare...

item.title: North Carolina State Senate Leader Defeated Despite Trump Endorsement
item.description: In North Carolina, state Senate leader Phil Berger, who had been endorsed by former President Donald Trump, unexpectedly lost his primary election to conservative challenger Steve Jarvis. The result w...

item.title: TMC(M) to Contest Five Seats in NDA Using BJP's Symbol in Tamil Nadu Assembly Polls 2026
item.description: In the upcoming Tamil Nadu Assembly elections of 2026, the Tamil Maanila Congress (Moopanar), led by G.K. Vasan, has been allocated five constituencies under the AIADMK-led National Democratic Allianc...

item.title: Australia’s Energy Future: Time to Move Away from Fossil Fuels and Embrace Renewables
item.description: As global tensions rise, particularly the ongoing war in the Middle East, Australia faces a critical opportunity to rethink its energy strategy. The war has sparked a new fuel crisis, pushing up petro...

item.title: Celebrating Indigenous Art and Identity at the Art Gallery of Western Australia
item.description: The I AM exhibition at the Art Gallery of Western Australia presents a rich and diverse collection of Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander artworks, curated by Carly Lane, a Murri woman from Queensla...
